name: closed loop step provenance-check passes for every active standards-derived rule
command: mkdir -p active-rules && printf 'rule_id: owasp-asvs-5-2-5\nprovenance: [{class: published-standard, source_id: owasp-asvs, section_id: 5.2.5, fetched_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z}]\n' > active-rules/owasp-asvs-5-2-5.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step provenance-check --rules-dir active-rules --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>out.txt && grep -q 'all_rules_have_provenance=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
